description_long: A rectangular cardboard box is open, revealing six assorted donuts arranged in two rows. The donuts display a variety of toppings and glazes, including chocolate, sprinkles, and plain finishes. The box interior is a light tan color, while the exterior is a reddish-brown with a circular logo printed on the lid. The donuts themselves are round with a central hole, and their surfaces show a mix of smooth chocolate glaze, colorful sprinkles, and plain dough. The box appears to be a standard bakery or takeout style, suitable for carrying multiple pastries. The overall appearance suggests a fresh, inviting assortment ready for sharing or individual enjoyment.
description: An open cardboard box contains six assorted donuts with various glazes and toppings, including chocolate and sprinkles. The box is reddish-brown with a visible logo on the lid.
description_view_0: This view shows the open box from above, clearly displaying all six donuts and their assorted toppings.
description_view_1: A side angle reveals the depth of the box and the upright lid, with the donuts partially visible inside.
description_view_2: The back of the closed box is visible, featuring a circular logo on the reddish-brown exterior, with no donuts in view.
description_view_3: An angled side view highlights the open lid and the arrangement of donuts, with the toppings and glazes partially visible.
attribute_icing_type: Chocolate glaze, plain glaze, and white icing with colored sprinkles; some donuts appear unglazed.
attribute_packaging_style: Rectangular cardboard box with a hinged lid, reddish-brown exterior, and printed logo.
attribute_brand_logo: A circular logo is visible on the exterior of the box lid.
